summary: Iteration 7 features - MongoDB game cache, genres list, genre+year filters, buy_links, and a11y DialogTitle fix - all tested. 25/25 backend tests pass (9 new + 16 regression). Frontend BrowseAllPage renders 24 genre chips + 31-option year dropdown, filters wired to backend params produce the expected reduced result sets (92 -> 84 with Shooter -> 13 with Shooter+2023). Clear filters works. ContentModal shows colored 'Where to play / buy:' section with 6 store links (steam, gog, epicgames, official, psn, xbox, amazon depending on game). DialogTitle a11y warning is GONE. One residual minor Radix Dialog `aria-describedby` warning remains (separate a11y nit).

issues: Minor Radix a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent' - the previous DialogTitle warning IS fixed; this is a different (lower-severity) warning asking for a sr-only description. Optional polish: add a hidden DialogDescription.

action_items: OPTIONAL polish: add a sr-only <DialogDescription> inside ContentModal/Onboarding to silence the residual aria-describedby Radix warning. Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: game_routes.py: MongoDB cache key for /trending and /top-rated includes (limit, genre, year) so distinct filter combos cache distinctly - good. Cache TTLs (1h/6h/30m/2h/24h) are reasonable.

game_routes.py _build_buy_links: handles direct IGDB website types 1/13/15/16/17/22/23/24 then falls back to search URLs only when missing - GTA V correctly returned PSN search URL fallback while Witcher 3 returned the direct PSN URL. Amazon link always appended.

BrowseAllPage.jsx: useEffect depends on [activePlatform, sort, genre, year] and re-fetches on change - good integration. 'Clear filters' resets genre+year+sort. hasFilters shows the link only when non-default.

Cache uses string ISO timestamp for expires_at; not auto-pruned by Mongo TTL index. Cold cache will grow over time; consider creating a Mongo TTL index on `expires_at` (after converting to native datetime) for auto-cleanup. Non-blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (genre chips, year dropdown, filter integration, clear filters, ContentModal buy_links, DialogTitle a11y)

seed_data_creation: None - filters and cache populated by live IGDB hits during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 (cache+filters+buy_links+a11y) is fully GREEN. /api/games/genres returns 24 genres. Cache hits are sub-second on 2nd call. Witcher 3 (id=1942) has 8 store kinds; GTA V (id=1020) has 6 (with psn/xbox fallback search URLs). The previous DialogTitle warning is fixed by adding sr-only DialogTitle in ContentModal.jsx (line 152) and Onboarding.jsx (line 116). One residual minor Radix Dialog `aria-describedby` warning remains; main agent can fix optionally with a sr-only DialogDescription.

features_tested.backend_genres_list: PASS (24 genres including Shooter, RPG, Adventure)
features_tested.backend_witcher3_buy_links: PASS (steam, gog, amazon at minimum, no duplicates)
features_tested.backend_regression_16_tests: PASS (all prior IGDB endpoints still green)
